buy_side_bullets: Most dangerous phase of the Big Cycle — debt, political disorder, geopolitical conflict converging; 'modern mercantilism' replacing globalization. [Dalio]
Capital preservation is top priority — US equity market most expensive since 1996; direct macro expression over equity proxies. [Einhorn]
3-3-3 plan on track: 3% GDP, 3% deficit/GDP, 3M bpd oil — no recession; 'blockbuster year' for US economy. [Bessent]
Macro alpha migrating from rates/FX to equities — Brevan Howard's equity gains offsetting traditional rate/currency losses. [A. Howard]
sell_side_bullets: Bubble alarm: only 21 stocks (4% of S&P) making new highs — last seen March 2000; Bull & Bear indicator at 8.5 in sell-signal territory. [Hartnett]
Double-digit inflation now possible — 'Ice Age' thesis pivoting to fiscal dominance; consumer tapped out, margins at risk. [Edwards]
S&P 500 raised to 8,250 — highest on Wall Street; 'Roaring 2020s' (60% probability); EPS $310; inflation peaked in 2025. [Yardeni]
Two-stage 2026: H1 Great Rotation (tech-to-non-tech), then H2 broad selloff on weakening US economy; 40% recession probability. [Berezin]
Bull market alive but fault lines growing — earnings concentrated in few mega-caps; Iran energy shock straining stretched households. [Sonders]
whats_new: Dalio's 'modern mercantilism' thesis: globalization officially over — national self-interest sharply accelerating, 'capital wars' risk newly framed
Edwards explicitly abandoning Ice Age thesis — double-digit inflation call marks biggest stance shift from a permabear in years [Edwards shift]
Einhorn's capital-preservation signal: closing Greenlight to new investors July 1 while direct macro book generates all returns [Einhorn evolving]
Bessent's 3-3-3 plan publicly reiterated in Senate testimony — official Treasury framework now on record with explicit GDP target
vs_market_buy: Market not pricing Dalio's 'capital wars' risk — USD assets being repriced by foreign holders in ways consensus doesn't model. [Dalio]
Hartnett's 21-stock new-highs signal screams bubble divergence — market pricing in broad bull while breadth collapses. [Hartnett]
Edwards double-digit inflation scenario underpriced — fiscal dominance making central bank reaction function irrelevant. [Edwards]
vs_market_sell: 3% US GDP growth achievable by year-end — Treasury rejecting consensus growth skepticism. [Bessent]
S&P 8,250 target with EPS $310 — Yardeni's 'Roaring 2020s' materially above consensus earnings trajectory. [Yardeni]
